# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline using Temporary Files
# Temp files use predictable names with PID for tracking

# Define temp file paths using $$ (process ID) for tracking
TEMP_INPUT="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
TEMP_PROCESSED="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
TEMP_RESULTS="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"
TEMP_SUMMARY="/tmp/myapp-$$-summary.tmp"

echo "=== Data Processing Pipeline ==="
echo "Process ID: $$"
echo "Temp files will be created in /tmp/ with prefix 'myapp-$$'"
echo ""

# --- Stage 1: Generate/Collect Raw Data ---
echo "[Stage 1] Generating raw data into $TEMP_INPUT"

cat > "$TEMP_INPUT" <<EOF
2024-01-15,server01,cpu,78.5
2024-01-15,server02,cpu,45.2
2024-01-15,server03,cpu,92.1
2024-01-15,server01,memory,65.3
2024-01-15,server02,memory,80.7
2024-01-15,server03,memory,55.9
2024-01-15,server01,disk,40.0
2024-01-15,server02,disk,72.4
2024-01-15,server03,disk,88.6
2024-01-15,server01,cpu,82.3
2024-01-15,server02,cpu,47.8
2024-01-15,server03,cpu,95.0
2024-01-15,server01,memory,68.1
2024-01-15,server02,memory,83.2
2024-01-15,server03,memory,57.4
EOF

TOTAL_RAW_LINES=$(wc -l < "$TEMP_INPUT")
echo "  -> Written $TOTAL_RAW_LINES records to $TEMP_INPUT"
echo ""

# --- Stage 2: Validate and Clean Data ---
echo "[Stage 2] Validating and cleaning data..."

# Read from TEMP_INPUT, process, write to TEMP_PROCESSED
# Filter out records with values above a threshold (e.g., flag anomalies)
VALID_COUNT=0
INVALID_COUNT=0

while IFS=',' read -r date server metric value; do
    # Validate that value is a number
    if [[ "$value" =~ ^[0-9]+\.?[0-9]*$ ]]; then
        # Normalize: trim whitespace, ensure consistent format
        printf "%s,%s,%s,%.1f\n" "$date" "$server" "$metric" "$value" >> "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
        ((VALID_COUNT++))
    else
        echo "  [WARN] Invalid record skipped: $date,$server,$metric,$value"
        ((INVALID_COUNT++))
    fi
done < "$TEMP_INPUT"

echo "  -> Valid records: $VALID_COUNT, Invalid records: $INVALID_COUNT"
echo "  -> Cleaned data written to $TEMP_PROCESSED"
echo ""

# --- Stage 3: Process and Analyze Data ---
echo "[Stage 3] Analyzing data from $TEMP_PROCESSED..."

# Read from TEMP_PROCESSED multiple times for different analyses

# Analysis 3a: Calculate averages per metric type
echo "--- Average Values by Metric ---" > "$TEMP_RESULTS"

for metric_type in cpu memory disk; do
    SUM=0
    COUNT=0
    while IFS=',' read -r date server metric value; do
        if [[ "$metric" == "$metric_type" ]]; then
            SUM=$(echo "$SUM + $value" | bc)
            ((COUNT++))
        fi
    done < "$TEMP_PROCESSED"

    if [[ $COUNT -gt 0 ]]; then
        AVG=$(echo "scale=2; $SUM / $COUNT" | bc)
        echo "  $metric_type: avg=$AVG (from $COUNT samples)" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
    fi
done

echo "" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

# Analysis 3b: Find peak values per server
echo "--- Peak Values by Server ---" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

for srv in server01 server02 server03; do
    PEAK_METRIC=""
    PEAK_VALUE=0
    while IFS=',' read -r date server metric value; do
        if [[ "$server" == "$srv" ]]; then
            IS_HIGHER=$(echo "$value > $PEAK_VALUE" | bc)
            if [[ "$IS_HIGHER" -eq 1 ]]; then
                PEAK_VALUE="$value"
                PEAK_METRIC="$metric"
            fi
        fi
    done < "$TEMP_PROCESSED"
    echo "  $srv: peak=$PEAK_VALUE ($PEAK_METRIC)" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
done

echo "" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"

# Analysis 3c: Identify alerts (values > 85%)
echo "--- ALERTS (values > 85%) ---" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
ALERT_COUNT=0

while IFS=',' read -r date server metric value; do
    IS_ALERT=$(echo "$value > 85" | bc)
    if [[ "$IS_ALERT" -eq 1 ]]; then
        echo "  [ALERT] $server - $metric: ${value}%" >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
        ((ALERT_COUNT++))
    fi
done < "$TEMP_PROCESSED"

if [[ $ALERT_COUNT -eq 0 ]]; then
    echo "  No alerts found." >> "$TEMP_RESULTS"
fi

echo "  -> Analysis complete. Results written to $TEMP_RESULTS"
echo ""

# --- Stage 4: Generate Summary Report ---
echo "[Stage 4] Generating summary report..."

# Read from TEMP_RESULTS and create final summary in TEMP_SUMMARY
{
    echo "============================================"
    echo "  DATA PROCESSING PIPELINE - SUMMARY REPORT"
    echo "  Generated: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"
    echo "  Pipeline PID: $$"
    echo "============================================"
    echo ""
    echo "Input Statistics:"
    echo "  Total raw records: $TOTAL_RAW_LINES"
    echo "  Valid records: $VALID_COUNT"
    echo "  Invalid records: $INVALID_COUNT"
    echo ""
    # Include the analysis results
    cat "$TEMP_RESULTS"
    echo ""
    echo "Temp Files Used:"
    echo "  Raw data:    $TEMP_INPUT"
    echo "  Cleaned:     $TEMP_PROCESSED"
    echo "  Results:     $TEMP_RESULTS"
    echo "  Summary:     $TEMP_SUMMARY"
    echo ""
    echo "============================================"
    echo "  END OF REPORT"
    echo "============================================"
} > "$TEMP_SUMMARY"

echo "  -> Summary written to $TEMP_SUMMARY"
echo ""

# --- Stage 5: Display Final Results ---
echo "[Stage 5] Final Report Output:"
echo ""
cat "$TEMP_SUMMARY"
echo ""

# --- Stage 6: Verify temp files exist for tracking ---
echo "[Tracking] Listing all pipeline temp files:"
ls -la /tmp/myapp-$$.* 2>/dev/null
echo ""

# --- Cleanup ---
echo "[Cleanup] Removing temporary files..."
for tmpfile in "$TEMP_INPUT" "$TEMP_PROCESSED" "$TEMP_RESULTS" "$TEMP_SUMMARY"; do
    if [[ -f "$tmpfile" ]]; then
        rm -f "$tmpfile"
        echo "  Removed: $tmpfile"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Pipeline Complete ==="
